name: Sneakers O'Toole
description: He's not taking his sneakers off. He's Sneakers O'Toole.

moves.name: 👟 Shin Kick
moves.desc: Kicks opponents shins hard. High chance to paralyze.

moves.name: ✊ Rapid Punches
moves.desc: Sneakers O'Toole uses his infinity stones to stop time and rapidly hit the opponent.

moves.name: 🌊 Mud Trap
moves.desc: Slathers the enemy in sticky mud. Slows them down.

moves.name: 📉 Cinder Smoke
moves.desc: Thick smoke clouds the enemy's vision.

moves.name: 😵 Chaos Breath
moves.desc: Hits, then may poison AND confuse!
